description: Canonical CSF1R promoter window centered on the primary gene TSS from the Gencode v49 gene model.
source: Gencode v49 primary assembly annotation (CSF1R ENSG00000182578.15)

description: Operational e1 window placed at the HMGXB3 3-prime and CSF1R promoter-proximal edge of the Deliard et al. enhancer hub, aligned to monocyte raw-bin H3K27ac/H3K4me1 signal.
source: Deliard et al. NAR 2026 PMID 41538316; operational hg38 window inferred from published e1-e5 architecture plus monocyte raw-bin signal

description: Operational e2 window spanning the strong monocyte-active intragenic enhancer block between the promoter-proximal hub and the FIRE cluster.
source: Deliard et al. NAR 2026 PMID 41538316; operational hg38 window inferred from published e1-e5 architecture plus monocyte raw-bin signal

description: Operational e3 window capturing the intermediate intragenic enhancer block identified by monocyte raw-bin H3K27ac signal within the CSF1R enhancer hub.
source: Deliard et al. NAR 2026 PMID 41538316; operational hg38 window inferred from published e1-e5 architecture plus monocyte raw-bin signal

description: Operational e4 window placed immediately upstream of FIRE and supported by monocyte raw-bin H3K4me1/H3K27ac signal in the distal intronic enhancer cluster.
source: Deliard et al. NAR 2026 PMID 41538316; operational hg38 window inferred from published e1-e5 architecture plus monocyte raw-bin signal

description: Operational e5 window centered on the FIRE-overlapping enhancer identified in the literature, aligned to the strongest monocyte raw-bin H3K27ac segment within the curated human FIRE region.
source: Deliard et al. NAR 2026 PMID 41538316; NCBI Gene ID 111188156 (FIRE)
